sections.paragraph:
see צוּץ .

ציץ

(from the root צוּץ)-

(1) a shining plate, on the forehead of the high priest, -Ex. 28:3638 . Compare Psa 132:18.

(2) a flower, Job 14:2. Plur. צִצִּים (for צִיצִים comp. זִיקֹות, זִקִּים) 1Ki 6:18.

(3) a wing (compare at the root נָצַץ), Jer 48:9.

(4) [Ziz], pr.n. of a town, only once, 2Ch 20:16.
